shared_properties: The obstacle follows the same art deco gold trim language and hard-edge contrast used by the broader tower architecture.
All authored highlights stay within the project palette and avoid blurry bloom so the beam shader remains visually distinct.
The object is drawn for transparent-background compositing on a 16:9 orthographic scene.
differences: This asset prioritizes a clean reflection plane and visible pivot hardware over background ornament.
The bright interior strip is intentionally narrow so the reflected beam, not the frame, carries the main luminance.
The silhouette remains slender enough to fit on cramped puzzle floors without obscuring ladder rungs or door silhouettes.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the shadow survival loop, mirror and prism puzzle rules, scale targets, HUD placements, and Bevy runtime constraints for Umbra Scale.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art deco tower mood, silhouette contrast, gold trims, and hard-edge lighting style.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load mirror_reflector_panel.png during Loading and register pivot metadata so runtime rotation always occurs around the visual centerline.
runtime_notes: Author the mirror art with the reflective plane centered so 15 degree step rotation does not create a perceived collision drift.
Keep trim geometry lightweight because multiple mirrors can be visible in one room and the beam path must remain the brightest element.
The mirror sprite should support horizontal flipping for left and right facing puzzle layouts without losing the bevel highlight logic.

context.usage: Placed in puzzle rooms so the player can grab, move, and rotate reflected light paths into new shadow-safe routes.

readability_notes: The reflective strip is the brightest vertical element and sits inside a gold mechanical frame.
Pivot hardware is visible at both ends so players understand the object can rotate.
The frame thickness stays consistent at 6 px along the full panel length.

acceptance_criteria: Canvas is exactly 64x192 px and centered on the rotation axis with no extra transparent padding larger than 4 px on either side.
The reflective face stays readable at 50% preview scale against both dark and amber test backgrounds.
Gold frame thickness and bevel direction remain symmetrical when the sprite is rotated in 15 degree increments.
